name: @tracegraph/static-graph
description: Static architecture graph provider for TraceGraph (Graphify integration)

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --external '@tracegraph/*' && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='../cli/node_modules/@tracegraph/static-graph/dist';try{fs.copyFileSync('dist/index.js',p+'/index.js');fs.copyFileSync('dist/index.mjs',p+'/index.mjs');console.log('[static-graph] synced to cli junction');}catch(e){console.log('[static-graph] junction sync skipped:',e.code);}"
